predicate_mappings.control_unit_build_bound: release {} is bound to build artifact {}

initialize_release.description: initialize a release A as a registered release
preconditions: I can only initialize a release A as a registered release if it is not the case that A is a registered release and it is not the case that release A has been finalized
effects: Once I initialize a release A as a registered release, it is the case that A is a registered release

assign_release_to_tier.description: assign a release A to a customer tier B
preconditions: I can only assign a release A to a customer tier B if it is the case that A is a registered release and tier B is available and the release A is compatible with the customer tier B
I can only assign a release A to a customer tier B if it is not the case that the release A is tier reserved
effects: Once I assign a release A to a customer tier B, it is the case that A is assigned to the customer tier B and the release A is tier reserved
Once I assign a release A to a customer tier B, it is not the case anymore that tier B is available

unassign_release_from_tier.description: unassign a release A from a customer tier B
preconditions: I can only unassign a release A from a customer tier B if it is the case that A is assigned to the customer tier B

I can only unassign a release A from a customer tier B if it is not the case that the deployment of release A is confirmed and it is not the case that the validation gate for release A has been passed
effects: Once I unassign a release A from a customer tier B, it is the case that tier B is available

Once I unassign a release A from a customer tier B, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to the customer tier B and it is not the case anymore that the release A is tier reserved and it is not the case anymore that the release A is cohort enabled and it is not the case anymore that the release A is cohort validated and it is not the case anymore that release A is pending signoff and it is not the case anymore that release A is promoted and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional review

reserve_cohort_for_release.description: reserve a cohort B for a release A
preconditions: I can only reserve a cohort B for a release A if it is the case that A is a registered release and the cohort B is available
effects: Once I reserve a cohort B for a release A, it is the case that the release cohort B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a cohort B for a release A, it is not the case anymore that the cohort B is available

release_cohort_reservation.description: release reservation of a cohort B from a release A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of a cohort B from a release A if it is the case that the release cohort B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release reservation of a cohort B from a release A, it is the case that the cohort B is available
Once I release reservation of a cohort B from a release A, it is not the case anymore that the release cohort B is reserved for A

enable_cohort_for_release.description: enable a cohort B for a release A
preconditions: I can only enable a cohort B for a release A if it is the case that A is a registered release and the release A is tier reserved and the release cohort B is reserved for A
I can only enable a cohort B for a release A if it is not the case that the release A is cohort enabled
effects: Once I enable a cohort B for a release A, it is the case that the release A is cohort enabled

enable_cohort_with_approver.description: enable cohort for a release A with an approver B
preconditions: I can only enable cohort for a release A with an approver B if it is the case that A is a registered release and the release A is tier reserved and the approver B is available
I can only enable cohort for a release A with an approver B if it is not the case that the release A is cohort enabled
effects: Once I enable cohort for a release A with an approver B, it is the case that the release A is cohort enabled and release A is pending signoff
Once I enable cohort for a release A with an approver B, it is not the case anymore that the approver B is available

validate_cohort_with_automation.description: validate cohort a cohort B for a release A using an automation job C
preconditions: I can only validate cohort a cohort B for a release A using an automation job C if it is the case that the release A is cohort enabled and the release A is tier reserved and the release cohort B is reserved for A and the automation job C is available
I can only validate cohort a cohort B for a release A using an automation job C if it is not the case that the release A is cohort validated
effects: Once I validate cohort a cohort B for a release A using an automation job C, it is the case that the release A is cohort validated
Once I validate cohort a cohort B for a release A using an automation job C, it is not the case anymore that release A is pending signoff

validate_cohort_with_build.description: validate cohort for a release A using a build artifact B
preconditions: I can only validate cohort for a release A using a build artifact B if it is the case that the release A is tier reserved and release A is bound to build artifact B
I can only validate cohort for a release A using a build artifact B if it is not the case that the release A is cohort validated
effects: Once I validate cohort for a release A using a build artifact B, it is the case that the release A is cohort validated
Once I validate cohort for a release A using a build artifact B, it is not the case anymore that release A is pending signoff

bind_canary_policy.description: bind a release A with a canary policy B
preconditions: I can only bind a release A with a canary policy B if it is the case that A is a registered release and the canary policy B is available and the release A is compatible with the canary policy B
effects: Once I bind a release A with a canary policy B, it is the case that the release A is bound by the canary policy B
Once I bind a release A with a canary policy B, it is not the case anymore that the canary policy B is available

unbind_canary_policy.description: unbind a release A from a canary policy B
preconditions: I can only unbind a release A from a canary policy B if it is the case that the release A is bound by the canary policy B
effects: Once I unbind a release A from a canary policy B, it is the case that the canary policy B is available
Once I unbind a release A from a canary policy B, it is not the case anymore that the release A is bound by the canary policy B

bind_dependency_service.description: bind a release A to a dependency service B
preconditions: I can only bind a release A to a dependency service B if it is the case that A is a registered release and the dependency service B is available and the release A is compatible with the dependency service B
effects: Once I bind a release A to a dependency service B, it is the case that the release A is bound by the dependency service B
Once I bind a release A to a dependency service B, it is not the case anymore that the dependency service B is available

unbind_dependency_service.description: unbind a release A from a dependency service B
preconditions: I can only unbind a release A from a dependency service B if it is the case that the release A is bound by the dependency service B
effects: Once I unbind a release A from a dependency service B, it is the case that the dependency service B is available
Once I unbind a release A from a dependency service B, it is not the case anymore that the release A is bound by the dependency service B

bind_infrastructure_constraint.description: bind a release A to an infrastructure constraint B
preconditions: I can only bind a release A to an infrastructure constraint B if it is the case that A is a registered release and the infrastructure constraint B is available and the release A is compatible with the infrastructure constraint B
effects: Once I bind a release A to an infrastructure constraint B, it is the case that the release A is bound by the infrastructure constraint B
Once I bind a release A to an infrastructure constraint B, it is not the case anymore that the infrastructure constraint B is available

unbind_infrastructure_constraint.description: unbind a release A from an infrastructure constraint B
preconditions: I can only unbind a release A from an infrastructure constraint B if it is the case that the release A is bound by the infrastructure constraint B
effects: Once I unbind a release A from an infrastructure constraint B, it is the case that the infrastructure constraint B is available
Once I unbind a release A from an infrastructure constraint B, it is not the case anymore that the release A is bound by the infrastructure constraint B

attach_rollback_plan.description: attach a rollback plan B to a release A
preconditions: I can only attach a rollback plan B to a release A if it is the case that A is a registered release and the rollback plan B is available and the release A is compatible with the rollback plan B
effects: Once I attach a rollback plan B to a release A, it is the case that the release A has a rollback plan B attached
Once I attach a rollback plan B to a release A, it is not the case anymore that the rollback plan B is available

detach_rollback_plan.description: detach a rollback plan B from a release A
preconditions: I can only detach a rollback plan B from a release A if it is the case that the release A has a rollback plan B attached
effects: Once I detach a rollback plan B from a release A, it is the case that the rollback plan B is available
Once I detach a rollback plan B from a release A, it is not the case anymore that the release A has a rollback plan B attached

deploy_to_target_with_bindings.description: deploy a release A to a deployment target B with a canary policy C and a dependency service D
preconditions: I can only deploy a release A to a deployment target B with a canary policy C and a dependency service D if it is the case that the release A is tier reserved and the release A is bound by the canary policy C and the release A is bound by the dependency service D and the target B is available and the release A is compatible with the deployment target B
I can only deploy a release A to a deployment target B with a canary policy C and a dependency service D if it is not the case that the deployment of release A is confirmed
effects: Once I deploy a release A to a deployment target B with a canary policy C and a dependency service D, it is the case that the release A is deployed to the target B and the deployment of release A is confirmed
Once I deploy a release A to a deployment target B with a canary policy C and a dependency service D, it is not the case anymore that the target B is available

deploy_to_target_with_infra_and_tests.description: deploy a release A to a deployment target B with an infrastructure constraint C and an integration test suite D
preconditions: I can only deploy a release A to a deployment target B with an infrastructure constraint C and an integration test suite D if it is the case that the release A is tier reserved and the release A is bound by the infrastructure constraint C and the integration test suite D is available and the target B is available and the release A is compatible with the deployment target B and the release A is compatible with the integration test suite D
I can only deploy a release A to a deployment target B with an infrastructure constraint C and an integration test suite D if it is not the case that the deployment of release A is confirmed
effects: Once I deploy a release A to a deployment target B with an infrastructure constraint C and an integration test suite D, it is the case that the release A is deployed to the target B and the deployment of release A is confirmed and A requires additional review and release A is pending signoff

Once I deploy a release A to a deployment target B with an infrastructure constraint C and an integration test suite D, it is not the case anymore that the target B is available and it is not the case anymore that the integration test suite D is available

clear_review_flag_after_validation.description: clear review flag for a release A after validation with a canary policy B and a dependency service C
preconditions: I can only clear review flag for a release A after validation with a canary policy B and a dependency service C if it is the case that the deployment of release A is confirmed and A requires additional review and the release A is bound by the canary policy B and the release A is bound by the dependency service C
effects: Once I clear review flag for a release A after validation with a canary policy B and a dependency service C, it is not the case anymore that A requires additional review and it is not the case anymore that release A is pending signoff

mark_validation_gate_passed.description: mark validation gate passed for a release A with a canary policy B, a dependency service C, and a smoke suite D
preconditions: I can only mark validation gate passed for a release A with a canary policy B, a dependency service C, and a smoke suite D if it is the case that the release A is cohort validated and the deployment of release A is confirmed and the release A is bound by the canary policy B and the release A is bound by the dependency service C and the release A is compatible with the verification artifact D

I can only mark validation gate passed for a release A with a canary policy B, a dependency service C, and a smoke suite D if it is not the case that release A is pending signoff and it is not the case that the validation gate for release A has been passed
effects: Once I mark validation gate passed for a release A with a canary policy B, a dependency service C, and a smoke suite D, it is the case that the validation gate for release A has been passed

mark_validation_gate_with_rollback.description: mark validation gate with rollback for a release A using an infrastructure constraint B, a rollback plan C, and an observability check D
preconditions: I can only mark validation gate with rollback for a release A using an infrastructure constraint B, a rollback plan C, and an observability check D if it is the case that the release A is cohort validated and the deployment of release A is confirmed and the release A is bound by the infrastructure constraint B and the release A has a rollback plan C attached and the release A is compatible with the verification artifact D

I can only mark validation gate with rollback for a release A using an infrastructure constraint B, a rollback plan C, and an observability check D if it is not the case that the validation gate for release A has been passed
effects: Once I mark validation gate with rollback for a release A using an infrastructure constraint B, a rollback plan C, and an observability check D, it is the case that the validation gate for release A has been passed and release A is pending signoff

promote_release_wave.description: promote release wave for a release A using a canary policy B and a dependency service C
preconditions: I can only promote release wave for a release A using a canary policy B and a dependency service C if it is the case that the validation gate for release A has been passed and release A is pending signoff and the release A is bound by the canary policy B and the release A is bound by the dependency service C
effects: Once I promote release wave for a release A using a canary policy B and a dependency service C, it is the case that release A is promoted

Once I promote release wave for a release A using a canary policy B and a dependency service C, it is not the case anymore that release A is pending signoff and it is not the case anymore that the release A is cohort validated and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional review

revalidate_after_promotion.description: revalidate a release A after promotion using a cohort B and an automation job C
preconditions: I can only revalidate a release A after promotion using a cohort B and an automation job C if it is the case that release A is promoted and the validation gate for release A has been passed and the release A is tier reserved and the release cohort B is reserved for A and the automation job C is available
I can only revalidate a release A after promotion using a cohort B and an automation job C if it is not the case that the release A is cohort validated
effects: Once I revalidate a release A after promotion using a cohort B and an automation job C, it is the case that the release A is cohort validated

select_cohort_for_build_association.description: select a cohort B for build association with a release A
preconditions: I can only select a cohort B for build association with a release A if it is the case that the validation gate for release A has been passed and the release A is cohort validated and the release cohort B is reserved for A

I can only select a cohort B for build association with a release A if it is not the case that release A is pending signoff and it is not the case that the build selection for release A has been confirmed
effects: Once I select a cohort B for build association with a release A, it is the case that the build selection for release A has been confirmed

select_cohort_for_approver_build_associa.description: select cohort for approver build association with a release A and an approver B
preconditions: I can only select cohort for approver build association with a release A and an approver B if it is the case that the validation gate for release A has been passed and the release A is cohort validated and the approver B is available

I can only select cohort for approver build association with a release A and an approver B if it is not the case that release A is pending signoff and it is not the case that the build selection for release A has been confirmed
effects: Once I select cohort for approver build association with a release A and an approver B, it is the case that the build selection for release A has been confirmed
Once I select cohort for approver build association with a release A and an approver B, it is not the case anymore that the approver B is available

associate_build_with_release.description: associate a build artifact B with a release A
preconditions: I can only associate a build artifact B with a release A if it is the case that the build selection for release A has been confirmed and the build artifact B is available and A is associated with the rollout unit build slot binding for B
effects: Once I associate a build artifact B with a release A, it is the case that the rollout unit release A is compatible with the build artifact B
Once I associate a build artifact B with a release A, it is not the case anymore that the build artifact B is available

associate_build_with_control_and_rollout.description: associate a build artifact C with a control unit A and a rollout unit B
preconditions: I can only associate a build artifact C with a control unit A and a rollout unit B if it is the case that A is a registered release and the control unit flag is set for release A and release A is compatible with build artifact C and the rollout unit release B is compatible with the build artifact C
I can only associate a build artifact C with a control unit A and a rollout unit B if it is not the case that release A is bound to build artifact C
effects: Once I associate a build artifact C with a control unit A and a rollout unit B, it is the case that release A is bound to build artifact C

mark_automation_validation.description: mark automation validation for a release A with a cohort B using an automation job C
preconditions: I can only mark automation validation for a release A with a cohort B using an automation job C if it is the case that A is a registered release and the control unit flag is set for release A and the release A is cohort validated and the build selection for release A has been confirmed and the release cohort B is reserved for A and the automation job C is available
I can only mark automation validation for a release A with a cohort B using an automation job C if it is not the case that automation validation passed for release A
effects: Once I mark automation validation for a release A with a cohort B using an automation job C, it is the case that automation validation passed for release A

finalize_release_for_unit_type_primary.description: finalize release for unit type primary for a release A
preconditions: I can only finalize release for unit type primary for a release A if it is the case that the primary unit flag is set for release A and A is a registered release and the release A is tier reserved and the deployment of release A is confirmed and the validation gate for release A has been passed and the build selection for release A has been confirmed and the release A is cohort validated
I can only finalize release for unit type primary for a release A if it is not the case that release A has been finalized
effects: Once I finalize release for unit type primary for a release A, it is the case that release A has been finalized

finalize_release_for_unit_with_build.description: finalize release for unit with build a release A bound to a build artifact B
preconditions: I can only finalize release for unit with build a release A bound to a build artifact B if it is the case that the control unit flag is set for release A and A is a registered release and the release A is tier reserved and the deployment of release A is confirmed and the validation gate for release A has been passed and the build selection for release A has been confirmed and the release A is cohort validated and release A is bound to build artifact B
I can only finalize release for unit with build a release A bound to a build artifact B if it is not the case that release A has been finalized
effects: Once I finalize release for unit with build a release A bound to a build artifact B, it is the case that release A has been finalized

finalize_release_for_unit_with_automatio.description: finalize release for unit with automation validation for a release A
preconditions: I can only finalize release for unit with automation validation for a release A if it is the case that the control unit flag is set for release A and A is a registered release and the release A is tier reserved and the deployment of release A is confirmed and the validation gate for release A has been passed and the build selection for release A has been confirmed and the release A is cohort validated and automation validation passed for release A
I can only finalize release for unit with automation validation for a release A if it is not the case that release A has been finalized
effects: Once I finalize release for unit with automation validation for a release A, it is the case that release A has been finalized

action_nl_templates.initialize_release: initialize release {?release} as a registered release
action_nl_templates.release_cohort_reservation: release reservation of cohort {?cohort} from release {?release}
action_nl_templates.enable_cohort_with_approver: enable cohort for release {?release} with approver {?operator_approval}
action_nl_templates.validate_cohort_with_automation: validate cohort cohort {?cohort} for release {?release} using automation job {?automation_job}
action_nl_templates.validate_cohort_with_build: validate cohort for release {?release} using build artifact {?build_artifact}
action_nl_templates.deploy_to_target_with_bindings: deploy release {?release} to deployment target {?deployment_target} with canary policy {?canary_policy} and dependency service {?dependency_service}
action_nl_templates.deploy_to_target_with_infra_and_tests: deploy release {?release} to deployment target {?deployment_target} with infrastructure constraint {?infrastructure_constraint} and integration test suite {?integration_test_suite}
action_nl_templates.clear_review_flag_after_validation: clear review flag for release {?release} after validation with canary policy {?canary_policy} and dependency service {?dependency_service}
action_nl_templates.mark_validation_gate_passed: mark validation gate passed for release {?release} with canary policy {?canary_policy}, dependency service {?dependency_service}, and smoke suite {?smoke_suite}
action_nl_templates.mark_validation_gate_with_rollback: mark validation gate with rollback for release {?release} using infrastructure constraint {?infrastructure_constraint}, rollback plan {?rollback_plan}, and observability check {?observability_check}
action_nl_templates.promote_release_wave: promote release wave for release {?release} using canary policy {?canary_policy} and dependency service {?dependency_service}
action_nl_templates.revalidate_after_promotion: revalidate release {?release} after promotion using cohort {?cohort} and automation job {?automation_job}
action_nl_templates.select_cohort_for_build_association: select cohort {?cohort} for build association with release {?release}
action_nl_templates.select_cohort_for_approver_build_associa: select cohort for approver build association with release {?release} and approver {?operator_approval}
action_nl_templates.associate_build_with_control_and_rollout: associate build artifact {?build_artifact} with control unit {?control_unit} and rollout unit {?rollout_unit}

action_nl_templates_indef.initialize_release: initialize a release {?release} as a registered release
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_release_to_tier: assign a release {?release} to a customer tier {?customer_tier}
action_nl_templates_indef.unassign_release_from_tier: unassign a release {?release} from a customer tier {?customer_tier}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_cohort_for_release: reserve a cohort {?cohort} for a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_cohort_reservation: release reservation of a cohort {?cohort} from a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.enable_cohort_for_release: enable a cohort {?cohort} for a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.enable_cohort_with_approver: enable cohort for a release {?release} with an approver {?operator_approval}

action_nl_templates_indef.validate_cohort_with_build: validate cohort for a release {?release} using a build artifact {?build_artifact}

action_nl_templates_indef.unbind_canary_policy: unbind a release {?release} from a canary policy {?canary_policy}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_dependency_service: bind a release {?release} to a dependency service {?dependency_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.unbind_dependency_service: unbind a release {?release} from a dependency service {?dependency_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_infrastructure_constraint: bind a release {?release} to an infrastructure constraint {?infrastructure_constraint}
action_nl_templates_indef.unbind_infrastructure_constraint: unbind a release {?release} from an infrastructure constraint {?infrastructure_constraint}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_rollback_plan: attach a rollback plan {?rollback_plan} to a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.detach_rollback_plan: detach a rollback plan {?rollback_plan} from a release {?release}

action_nl_templates_indef.mark_validation_gate_with_rollback: mark validation gate with rollback for a release {?release} using an infrastructure constraint {?infrastructure_constraint}, a rollback plan {?rollback_plan}, and an observability check {?observability_check}

action_nl_templates_indef.revalidate_after_promotion: revalidate a release {?release} after promotion using a cohort {?cohort} and an automation job {?automation_job}

action_nl_templates_indef.associate_build_with_control_and_rollout: associate a build artifact {?build_artifact} with a control unit {?control_unit} and a rollout unit {?rollout_unit}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_automation_validation: mark automation validation for a release {?release} with a cohort {?cohort} using an automation job {?automation_job}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_release_for_unit_type_primary: finalize release for unit type primary for a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_release_for_unit_with_build: finalize release for unit with build a release {?release} bound to a build artifact {?build_artifact}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a release or a customer tier or a deployment target or a dependency service or a canary policy or a infrastructure constraint or a cohort or a approver or a build artifact or a automation job or a integration test suite or a rollback plan or a verification artifact is also a object
Everything that is a smoke suite or a observability check is also a verification artifact
Everything that is a rollout unit or a control unit is also a release
